g.text: Source Type | Target Type | Target Slot | Order

ol.li: Stub Triggers: Guard fails, CPU jumps to generated stub.
Register Snapshot: Stub pushes all registers to SavedRegisters struct.
Metadata Lookup: C logic uses faulting RIP to find DeoptEntry.

ul.li: Values pulled from registers array or rbp offsets.

ol.li: Resume: Interpreter loop starts at pc = bytecode + deopt_entry->pc.
